summary: Comprehensive testing of CIA SERVICIOS multi-tenant SaaS application. All backend APIs (18/18) passed. All frontend features tested successfully including Super Admin Portal, Company Portal, User Management, and module navigation.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

backend_apis: Super Admin Login Invalid Key (401 response)
Super Admin Login Invalid Password (401 response)
frontend_flows: Super Admin Login page loads with proper styling
Super Admin Login with valid credentials
Super Admin Dashboard shows statistics (Total Empresas, Activas, Pendientes, Ingresos)
Super Admin - Create Company dialog opens with all fields
Company Login page loads with company branding
Company Dashboard with KPIs (Proyectos, Facturación, Clientes, Pipeline)
Company Settings - User management table displays
Company Settings - Create new user with role selection

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about Recharts dimensions (-1 width/height) - recommend adding minWidth/minHeight to chart containers
seed_data_creation: Demo company 'CIA Servicios Demo S.A. de C.V.' with projects, clients, quotes, invoices data already seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: Super Admin portal at /admin-portal, Company portal at /empresa/{slug}/login. User management tested with role creation (admin, manager, user). Navigation between all modules verified. Previous iteration React errors have been fixed.
